name: design-docs-agent
description: Generate or update TRR design-docs pages from saved source bundles, HTML captures, and source inventories.

interface.shortDescription: Generate or update TRR design-docs pages from saved source bundles, HTML captures, and source inventories.
interface.longDescription: Shared Design Docs package for Claude Code and Codex. Runtime roster, phase order, shared capabilities, and per-skill versions are defined in agents/openai.yaml. Package-owned contracts live under contracts/ and drive validation, paywall policy, and external-app compatibility checks.
defaultPrompt: Use design docs to ingest an article plus a saved source bundle.
List the shared Design Docs skill roster.
Validate the design-docs-agent package contracts and runtime roster.
